title: Squidpy: a scalable framework for spatial omics analysis

result_match_policy.dataset_snapshot_policy: compare only against benchmark-pinned dataset and image manifests, not an unpinned live Squidpy installation

children.name: Load Visium H&E dataset
children.requirement: Load the official Visium H&E AnnData object from Squidpy and preserve its observation and variable metadata.
children.grading_notes: The benchmark should use the official built-in dataset rather than a lookalike local export.

children.name: Load seqFISH dataset
children.requirement: Load an official generic-coordinate dataset such as seqFISH for cell-level spatial analyses.
children.grading_notes: The implementation should make clear that this dataset is used for non-grid spatial statistics.

children.name: Attach spatial coordinates
children.requirement: Preserve or expose the spatial coordinates in the expected Squidpy-compatible location.
children.grading_notes: Coordinates may live in AnnData obsm or an equivalent documented structure.

children.name: Load histology image container
children.requirement: Load the Visium H&E image through a Squidpy-compatible image container workflow.
children.grading_notes: Image loading must be explicit if the submission later claims image features.

children.name: Construct geometry-aware spatial graph
children.requirement: Construct a spatial-neighbor graph using geometry-aware settings appropriate to the chosen assay.
children.grading_notes: Grid-like and generic-coordinate data should not be treated identically without justification.

children.name: Parameterize graph builder
children.requirement: Set graph-construction parameters such as coord_type, radius, or Delaunay usage explicitly.
children.grading_notes: The benchmark rewards explicit handling of graph assumptions.

children.name: Run neighborhood enrichment
children.requirement: Compute neighborhood enrichment on a cluster or cell-type annotation.
children.grading_notes: The implementation should produce a z-score style neighborhood-enrichment result.

children.name: Run centrality or interaction summary
children.requirement: Compute a cluster-level graph summary such as centrality scores or an interaction matrix.
children.grading_notes: At least one graph-derived cluster summary is required.

children.name: Run co-occurrence analysis
children.requirement: Compute cluster co-occurrence across increasing spatial radii.
children.grading_notes: The output should preserve the radius-dependent structure rather than collapse to a single score.

children.name: Run Moran or Geary statistics
children.requirement: Compute spatial autocorrelation statistics such as Moran's I or Geary's C on the benchmark dataset.
children.grading_notes: At least one gene-level spatial-autocorrelation workflow is required.

children.name: Rank spatially variable genes
children.requirement: Produce a ranked table of spatially variable genes with multiple-testing correction.
children.grading_notes: The ranking should be machine-readable and reproducible.

children.name: Run Ripley statistics
children.requirement: Compute a Ripley family statistic for a labeled cell-type or cluster pattern.
children.grading_notes: Ripley L, K, F, or G are acceptable if documented.

children.name: Compare clustered versus dispersed regimes
children.requirement: Interpret whether the observed spatial pattern is clustered, dispersed, or close to random at one or more scales.
children.grading_notes: This can be a table, text summary, or plotted statistic.

children.name: Export spatial-statistics artifacts
children.requirement: Write spatial-statistics tables and summaries to disk.
children.grading_notes: Credit requires durable outputs rather than notebook-only display.

children.name: Compute image features
children.requirement: Compute one or more image-feature families such as summary, texture, or segmentation-derived features.
children.grading_notes: The feature family should be named explicitly.

children.name: Compute segmentation-derived features
children.requirement: Compute segmentation-derived region properties or an equivalent cell-shape summary.
children.grading_notes: The benchmark accepts pre-existing segmentation labels or benchmark-generated labels.

children.name: Join image features to observations
children.requirement: Join the image-derived features back to the expression object or a keyed table aligned to observations.
children.grading_notes: The scorer must be able to line up features with spots or cells.

children.name: Compare image and expression structure
children.requirement: Compare image-derived structure with transcriptomic clusters using a clustering or similarity analysis.
children.grading_notes: An ARI, NMI, or similar metric is acceptable.

children.name: Run ligand-receptor or equivalent interaction analysis
children.requirement: Run Squidpy ligand-receptor analysis or another documented interaction-style summary supported by the benchmark.
children.grading_notes: The benchmark focuses on reproducible ranked interactions rather than exhaustive downstream biology.

children.name: Select marker genes for visualization
children.requirement: Choose marker or spatially variable genes to visualize on the tissue or cell map.
children.grading_notes: The gene-selection strategy should be explicit.

children.name: Generate spatial visualizations
children.requirement: Generate spatial scatter or image-overlay plots tied to the analysis outputs.
children.grading_notes: A plot alone is not enough for result-match credit, but it is required here.

children.name: Export reproducible summary
children.requirement: Write a concise reproducible report summarizing datasets, graph settings, and key findings.
children.grading_notes: Markdown, JSON, or YAML are all acceptable.

children.name: Visium dataset loads without fatal error
children.requirement: Load the benchmarked Visium dataset without fatal error.
children.grading_notes: Warnings are acceptable if the resulting object is usable.

children.name: seqFISH dataset loads without fatal error
children.requirement: Load the benchmarked generic-coordinate dataset without fatal error.
children.grading_notes: The dataset must preserve labels and coordinates.

children.name: Image container loads without fatal error
children.requirement: Load the image container and make it available for downstream feature extraction.
children.grading_notes: The image may be lazy-loaded but must be usable later.

children.name: Spatial graph artifacts written
children.requirement: Write graph connectivity artifacts or an AnnData object containing them.
children.grading_notes: The scorer should be able to verify that a graph was actually computed.

children.name: Neighborhood enrichment written
children.requirement: Write neighborhood-enrichment results to disk.
children.grading_notes: Expected outputs include z-scores or an equivalent matrix.

children.name: Centrality or interaction summary written
children.requirement: Write a centrality or cluster-interaction summary to disk.
children.grading_notes: At least one graph-derived cluster summary is required.

children.name: Co-occurrence results written
children.requirement: Write co-occurrence results across radii to disk.
children.grading_notes: The output must preserve the radius dimension.

children.name: Moran or Geary results written
children.requirement: Write spatial-autocorrelation results to disk.
children.grading_notes: A ranked table is preferred.

children.name: Top spatial-gene table written
children.requirement: Write a machine-readable table of top spatially variable genes.
children.grading_notes: CSV, TSV, parquet, or AnnData uns exports are acceptable.

children.name: Ripley statistics written
children.requirement: Write Ripley statistics to disk.
children.grading_notes: The output may be a table, serialized object, or plotted summary with underlying data.

children.name: Spatial-statistics plot written
children.requirement: Write at least one plot tied to the spatial-statistics results.
children.grading_notes: The plot may be raster or vector.

children.name: Image-feature job executes
children.requirement: Execute image-feature extraction without fatal error.
children.grading_notes: The job must produce a non-empty feature table.

children.name: Segmentation features written
children.requirement: Write segmentation-derived features or region properties to disk.
children.grading_notes: The benchmark accepts benchmark-provided segmentation labels if documented.

children.name: Integrated feature matrix written
children.requirement: Write the joined image-plus-expression feature matrix or equivalent aligned table.
children.grading_notes: The scorer must be able to align features to observations.

children.name: Interaction analysis executes
children.requirement: Execute the interaction-analysis branch without fatal error.
children.grading_notes: Ligand-receptor analysis or a benchmark-approved equivalent is acceptable.

children.name: Visualization report written
children.requirement: Write the final visualization/reporting artifacts to disk.
children.grading_notes: The report should mention datasets and major outputs.

children.name: Visium shape within tolerance
children.requirement: The loaded Visium H&E dataset has observation and gene counts within 1% of the official built-in dataset shape.
children.grading_notes: Use the benchmark-pinned dataset manifest rather than a drifting library-version-dependent shape.

children.name: seqFISH shape within tolerance
children.requirement: The loaded seqFISH dataset has observation and gene counts within 1% of the official built-in dataset shape.
children.grading_notes: Use the benchmark-pinned dataset manifest rather than a drifting library-version-dependent shape.

children.name: Image shape within tolerance
children.requirement: The loaded Visium H&E image dimensions are within 2% of the benchmark reference image shape.
children.grading_notes: This guards against loading the wrong image asset or a cropped surrogate.

children.name: Label vocabulary matches reference
children.requirement: The cluster or cell-type label vocabulary for the benchmark dataset matches the hidden reference after normalization.
children.grading_notes: Ontology-style normalization of labels is allowed if a dataset uses synonyms.

children.name: Visium graph edge count within reference band
children.requirement: The Visium spatial graph edge count lies within 2% of the benchmark-pinned hidden reference.
children.grading_notes: Compare after the benchmark-standard graph-construction settings are applied.

children.name: seqFISH graph edge count within reference band
children.requirement: The seqFISH spatial graph edge count lies within 2% of the benchmark-pinned hidden reference.
children.grading_notes: Compare after the benchmark-standard graph-construction settings are applied.

children.name: Neighborhood-enrichment ranking overlap above threshold
children.requirement: The ranked neighborhood-enrichment pairs reach rank-biased overlap of at least 0.65 against the hidden reference over the top 20 cluster pairs.
children.grading_notes: Use the benchmark-standard neighborhood-enrichment ranking and pair normalization.

children.name: Expected positive neighbor pair recovered
children.requirement: At least one expected high-enrichment pair from the benchmark reference set is recovered among the top-ranked neighborhood pairs.
children.grading_notes: The hidden reference set is derived from the paper's canonical spatial associations.

children.name: Centrality ranking overlap above threshold
children.requirement: The ranked centrality summary for the benchmark cell types or clusters reaches Spearman rho of at least 0.80 against the hidden reference.
children.grading_notes: Compare the ordered centrality scores after aligning normalized cluster labels.

children.name: Co-occurrence curve overlap above threshold
children.requirement: The benchmark co-occurrence curve reaches mean Pearson correlation of at least 0.85 against the hidden reference across the fixed benchmark radius grid.
children.grading_notes: Use the benchmark's fixed radius grid and compare matched cluster-pair curves.

children.name: Interaction-matrix overlap above threshold
children.requirement: The cluster-interaction matrix or equivalent summary reaches Spearman rho of at least 0.80 against the hidden reference after vectorizing the upper triangle.
children.grading_notes: Numeric-first comparator leaf.

children.name: Known spatial association recovered
children.requirement: A benchmarked paper-consistent spatial association such as an embryonic lineage adjacency is recovered with the correct sign and ranking direction.
children.grading_notes: The pair is benchmark-pinned and should appear among the top five positive neighborhood-enrichment pairs.

children.name: Top Moran genes overlap above threshold
children.requirement: The top Moran-ranked genes on the benchmark Visium dataset reach rank-biased overlap of at least 0.70 against the hidden reference over the top 20 genes.
children.grading_notes: Numeric-first comparator leaf.

children.name: Olfm1 Moran statistic close to reference
children.requirement: The Moran's I value for Olfm1 is within 0.05 of the benchmark reference value.
children.grading_notes: The reference value is derived from the official tutorial output.

children.name: Plp1 Moran statistic close to reference
children.requirement: The Moran's I value for Plp1 is within 0.05 of the benchmark reference value.
children.grading_notes: The reference value is derived from the official tutorial output.

children.name: Geary ranking overlap above threshold
children.requirement: The top Geary-ranked genes reach rank-biased overlap of at least 0.65 against the hidden reference over the top 20 genes.
children.grading_notes: Numeric-first comparator leaf.

children.name: Ripley curve overlap above threshold
children.requirement: The benchmark Ripley statistic curve reaches Pearson correlation of at least 0.90 against the hidden reference across the fixed benchmark radius grid.
children.grading_notes: Use the benchmark's fixed radius grid and matched statistic family.

children.name: Spatial-gene FDR count within reference band
children.requirement: The number of significant spatially variable genes lies within 15% of the hidden reference after the benchmark-standard multiple-testing correction.
children.grading_notes: Compare counts after the benchmark-standard multiple-testing correction.

children.name: Spatial localization pattern recovered
children.requirement: At least one benchmarked top spatial gene shows the correct broad localization pattern against the hidden reference.
children.grading_notes: This leaf is graded with region-wise Pearson correlation of at least 0.60 after benchmark-standard spatial binning, not free-form image matching.

children.name: Image-feature matrix dimensionality within band
children.requirement: The image-feature matrix has exact row alignment to the hidden reference and a feature count within 10% of the benchmark-pinned reference.
children.grading_notes: Compare both row alignment and feature dimensionality.

children.name: Segmentation feature count within band
children.requirement: The number of segmentation-derived features or labels lies within 20% of the hidden reference.
children.grading_notes: The benchmark accepts either benchmark-generated or benchmark-supplied segmentation labels.

children.name: Image-feature cluster alignment above threshold
children.requirement: Clustering based on image-derived features reaches ARI of at least 0.25 against hidden-reference transcriptomic clusters or benchmark image clusters.
children.grading_notes: Numeric-first comparator leaf.

children.name: Texture or summary feature ranking overlap above threshold
children.requirement: The ranked image features for a benchmark task reach rank-biased overlap of at least 0.60 against the hidden reference over the top 10 features.
children.grading_notes: Numeric-first comparator leaf.

children.name: Image-feature structure nondegenerate
children.requirement: The image-derived clustering is informative but nondegenerate relative to the hidden reference, with at least three non-empty clusters and no single cluster containing more than 60% of observations.
children.grading_notes: This leaf fails collapsed or trivially identical clusterings.

children.name: Top interaction pairs overlap above threshold
children.requirement: The ranked interaction pairs reach rank-biased overlap of at least 0.60 against the hidden reference over the top 20 interaction pairs.
children.grading_notes: Numeric-first comparator leaf.

children.name: Significant interaction count within band
children.requirement: The number of significant interaction pairs lies within 25% of the hidden reference after the benchmark-standard significance cutoff.
children.grading_notes: Compare after the benchmark-standard significance cutoff.

children.name: Marker localization consistency recovered
children.requirement: A benchmarked marker-gene spatial visualization is consistent with the hidden-reference localization summary.
children.grading_notes: This uses region-wise Pearson correlation of at least 0.60 after benchmark-standard spatial binning, not free-form plot grading.
